Manage your consent preferences
When you visit this site, we may store or access information on your browser, mostly through cookies. These help the site function as intended, remember your preferences, and provide a more personalized experience. The information typically does not directly identify you, but it can improve how the site works for you. You can choose which types of cookies to allow. However, blocking certain cookies may affect how the site functions or limit the services we can provide.
Essential
On
Essential cookies and services enable core website features and provide a seamless user experience. Essential cookies and services are used to facilitate features such as navigation, remember user preferences, and ensure the security of the website.
Vendors
Functional
On
Functional cookies and services remember your preferences and choices, such as language preferences, font sizes, region selections, and customized layouts. They enable this website to offer enhanced and personalized functionalities.
Marketing
On
Marketing cookies and services support delivering personalized advertisements, promotions, and offers that are relevant to you. They help optimize ad delivery, measure campaign effectiveness, and enable advertisers to reach specific target audiences.
Vendors
Analytics
On
Analytics cookies and services are for collecting aggregated data and statistical information. This data helps us analyze and optimize site performance, identify popular content, detect navigation issues, and make informed decisions to enhance the user experience.

에피타이저 | APPETIZERS
A1. 고기만두
Gogi Mandu
Steamed beef, pork, and chive dumplings, served with soy dipping sauce.
A2. 김치만두
Kimchi Mandu
🌶️
Steamed beef, pork, and kimchi dumplings, served with soy dipping sauce.
A3. 부추전
Buchujeon
V
Crispy chive pancake w/vegetables. Served with soy dipping sauce. A perfect dish to enjoy with makgeolli (rice wine).
A4. 해물파전
Haemul Pajeon
Crispy seafood & vegetable pancake. Includes shrimp, octopus, clams, and mussels. Served with soy dipping sauce. A perfect dish to enjoy with makgeolli (rice wine).
A5. 고추장 육회
Gochujang Yukhoe
🌶️
Beef tartare dressed in a spicy fermented chili sauce. Served with raw egg yolk, Korean pear, cucumber, perilla leaf, and nori seaweed. Mix beef and yolk together and eat with pear and cucumber. Make wraps with perilla leaves and nori.
A6. 조개탕
Jogaetang
🌶️
GF
Littleneck clams steamed with anchovy broth, daikon radish, chilis, and chrysanthemum greens. Be sure to enjoy the broth as well.

M1. 제육볶음
Jeyuk Bokkeum
🌶️
A spicy stir-fried mix of thinly sliced pork shoulder and belly. Served with lettuce, perilla leaf, and raw garlic. Enjoy with rice or by making lettuce wraps.
